summary: US-846 regression verification passed. MZ-601 and MZ-602 dependency reports are present, valid, and accepted for their scopes. The post-MZ-602 test suite now provides executable evidence for PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, and PERSONAL-AC-2431. The full-bullet smoke uses the real engine plus heuristic AI, is deterministic for seed 639, reaches phase=finished with bulletTarget=1, verifies chosen actions against live legal actions before applyAction, has a bounded maxSteps=80, and exposes useful failure diagnostics. npm run verify passed for the complete suite and build.

tests_run.evidence: Read active Spexus tenant/project/component scope before Spexus task reads. Active project PERSONAL, component default.
Confirmed MZ-603 is critical regression verification for PERSONAL-US-846, depends on MZ-601 and MZ-602, and requires complete test suite results plus deterministic smoke evidence.
MZ-601 report is present, status=succeeded, risks=[], failure_type=not_applicable, and routes the AC-2431 full-bullet smoke gap to MZ-602/MZ-603/MZ-604.
MZ-602 report is present, status=succeeded, risks=[], failure_type=not_applicable, and records both targeted smoke regression and npm run verify as passed.

Orchestrator log marks PERSONAL-TASK-1168 and PERSONAL-TASK-1169 completed, current phase verification, current task PERSONAL-TASK-1170, and report paths match the exact dependency report paths requested.

The matrix covers deck/deal, bidding, fixed profile, legal actions, trick winner, whist/half-whist, all-pass, misere, scoring, save/load, AI legality, and full-bullet smoke. Its pre-MZ-602 full-bullet row is intentionally downstream-routed; the current MZ-602 source and test results close that routed gap for MZ-603.

runDeterministicSmoke defaults to fullBulletSmoke seed 639, supports initialState createNewGame(seed, bulletTarget), uses chooseAiAction through chooseDeterministicHarnessAction, checks selected action legality against getLegalActions, applies actions through applyAction, records trace entries with phase/actor/legalCount/action, stops on finished/noLegalActions/maxSteps, and builds diagnostics with seed, step, phase, actor, legalCount, legal actions, chosen action, trace, and cause.

The smoke test creates a real game with deterministicSeeds.fullBulletSmoke and fixtureDeals.fullBulletSmoke.bulletTarget=1, runs maxSteps=80, asserts stoppedReason=finished, finalSummary.phase=finished, completedSteps within the bound, non-empty trace, and step-to-step progress to guard against stuck runs.

AI integration verifies chooseAiAction is legal and applyAction-compatible across representative phases. The harness diagnostic test forces an illegal choice and asserts failure output includes seed, phase, actor, legal actions, legalCount, chosen action, and trace.

tests_run.command: rg -n "describe|it\(|expect\(" src/domain/cards.test.ts src/domain/rules.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/domain/scoring.test.ts src/persistence/saveStore.test.ts src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/startResume.integration.test.ts src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts src/test/us844Scoring.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Confirmed executable test owners exist for the US-846 rule-critical categories named by PERSONAL-REQ-1763 and PERSONAL-AC-2430, plus the new AC-2431 smoke coverage.
Vitest passed 14 test files / 137 tests, then tsc and vite build completed successfully.
Vitest passed 2 files / 5 tests, including the deterministic full-bullet smoke and harness diagnostics.

evidence_matrix.limitations: The matrix is a pre-MZ-602 design artifact; its full-bullet row remains downstream-routed, and current MZ-603 verification reconciles that row against post-MZ-602 executable evidence.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Exact dependency report paths were used; no report attempts were inferred.
Covers the current worktree state on 2026-07-06.
Determinism is asserted for the same seed on the short replay smoke and the full-bullet smoke uses the same fixed seed and deterministic AI chooser.
No mocked legal-action list or custom runner is used.

Diagnostics focus on harness failures caused by chooser/apply errors or illegal actions.
No justified exception is required for PERSONAL-REQ-1763, PERSONAL-AC-2430, or PERSONAL-AC-2431.
